last_concepts: market_reaction: NVIDIA 'largely conceded' China's AI chip market to Huawei while NVDA trades near all-time highs — the market's indifference to the concession is the story
educational: Active traders underperform the SPY — the gap is not strategy quality but behavioral friction (early exits, revenge trades, FOMO entries) — the index has no behaviors, that's its edge
trader_psychology: Sunday night fear — 9pm, charts closed, nothing in the news, and JT's wick is already flickering — the anxiety is conditioned and arrives before the trader decides to worry
